  'publisher': 'The Wall Street Journal',
  'summary': 'Several Italian airports have warned they are facing limited '

  'headline': "ISS recommends vote against BP board's move to scrap some "

  'publisher': 'Reuters',
  'summary': 'LONDON, April 4 (Reuters) - Influential proxy adviser '
